data.title: XRP Establishes Higher Range as in Positive Sign of Bullish Breakout
data.description:
• XRP is stabilizing near the top of its recent range, showing signs of bullish pressure as volatility narrows.
  • Despite market liquidations due to Middle East conflicts, XRP has held ground, forming higher lows within a $2.14–$2.18 trading band.
  • Technical indicators suggest a potential breakout setup, with Bollinger Bands tightening and XRP maintaining an ascending channel.

data.title: KindlyMD Raises Another $51.5M for Bitcoin Treasury Strategy
data.description:
• Health-care data firm KindlyMD raised another $51.5 million, bringing the firm's total capital raise to $763 million, directed for bitcoin purchases.
  • The firm, which pursues a bitcoin treasury strategy, has an impending merger with Nakamoto Holdings.
  • KindlyMD shares fell 7% early in the Friday session.

data.title: A South Korean Biotech Firms Gets $183.3M Funding to Build Bitcoin Treasury
data.description:
• Seongnam-based Bridge Biotherapeutics has received a 25 billion won ($183.3 million) backing from crypto investment firm Parataxis, with which it will build a BTC treasury.
  • Bridge will change its corporate name to Parataxis Korea and continue to trade on the South Korean stock market KOSDAQ.
  • Parataxis is currently preparing to list on public markets in the U.S. via a special purpose acquisition company, SilverBox Corp IV.

data.title: ATOM Breaks $4 Resistance as Volume Surges 3%
data.description:
• ATOM-USD breaks $4.00 resistance with significant volume spikes, climbing from $3.981 to $4.043 despite broader market uncertainty.
  • Geopolitical tensions between Iran and Israel intensify as rising conflict affects cryptocurrency markets, with ATOM showing resilience amid volatility.

data.title: TON Breaks $3 Barrier Amid Surging Volume, Riding Telegram's Growth
data.description:
• TON cryptocurrency has surpassed the $3 price mark with a 2.33% gain over 24 hours, showing strong bullish momentum and institutional accumulation.
  • WhatsApp's testing of advertisements is driving users toward Telegram's ad-free platform, potentially increasing adoption of the TON ecosystem.
  • Toncoin has secured its position among top cryptocurrencies with a 140% price jump in 2024, with analysts projecting it could reach $6.48 by 2025 and potentially $49.22 by 2030.

data.title: Polkadot's DOT Bounces 4% After Forming Triple Bottom at $3.47 Support Level
data.description:
• DOT bounced 4% after support held at the $3.47 level.
  • A bullish reversal pattern has formed, which suggests further potential upside.

data.title: Solana DEX Jupiter Pauses DAO Votes, Citing Breakdown in Trust
data.description:
• Jupiter DEX pauses DAO votes until end of 2025, citing structural issues and aiming to return with a more unified governance model in 2026.
  • No new DAO-funded Work Groups will be created, though staking rewards remain unchanged at 50 million JUP per quarter.
  • JUP price is down 21.8% over 30 days, but relatively stable after the announcement, trading at $0.405.

data.title: XRP Early Buyers Accelerate Profit-Taking as Regulatory Wins Bolster XRP Ecosystem
data.description:
• XRP is trading above $2, marking a more than 300% gain for early investors, leading to increased profit-taking.
  • On-chain data shows realized profits from XRP wallets reached $68.8 million, indicating distribution pressure as the token tests resistance levels.
  • Despite positive regulatory developments and Ripple's infrastructure expansion, XRP faces a supply overhang from long-term holders, affecting its ability to break above $2.20.

data.title: Bitcoin Cash Stages Surprise Run to Near $500 as Volumes Spike 500%
data.description:
• Bitcoin Cash surged to a two-month high, nearing the $500 mark, driven by institutional demand amid global market uncertainty.
  • Escalating U.S.-China trade tensions have increased interest in non-sovereign assets like Bitcoin Cash.
  • Despite volatility, Bitcoin Cash shows signs of institutional interest due to its scaling simplicity and fast settlement times.

data.title: Bitcoin Steady Above $104K as Traders Eye Historically Bullish Second Half
data.description:
• Crypto markets fell on Thursday amid hawkish macro guidance and global trade concerns.
  • Bitcoin and Ethereum saw slight declines, with Bitcoin near $104,700 and Ethereum just below $2,860.
  • The U.S. Senate's stablecoin framework passage signals a more regulatory-friendly environment for crypto.
